response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with current Staff-level work at Naver explicitly involving TypeScript, Node.js, and AI agent infrastructure (including MCP code generators) — a direct match for one of the more specialized requirements. He has demonstrated React, TypeScript, MongoDB, AWS, and TDD/CI-CD experience across enterprise roles (Tencent, RIDE Capital), strong testing culture (authored D-lang testing libraries), and a track record of architecture-level contributions. Gaps exist around explicit Nest.js and Vitest experience, and Kotlin is not present, but these are reasonably learnable given his polyglot background. Worth interviewing to validate framework specifics and recent React depth.
strengths: Current role directly involves AI agent infrastructure and MCP development
Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across senior enterprise roles
Strong testing, TDD, and craftsmanship background with OSS contributions
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the resume
Kotlin is absent and Java exposure is limited and dated
Significant career investment in D-lang may dilute relevance to the primary stack

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and Kotlin in stated experience
